+---+    +---+    
| A |    | B |    
+---+    +---+    
  :        :      
  :request :      
  +-------->      
 ++alt [is valid]+
 |:  ok    :     |
 |<--------+     |
 ++[invalid].....+
 |: error  :     |
 |<--------+     |
 ++--------+-----+
 ++opt [logging]+ 
 |+---+ log:    | 
 |<---+    :    | 
 |:        :    | 
 ++--------+----+ 
  :        :
